name: HMCS Lauzon (K 671)
events: 10 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted torpedo firing exercises off Bermuda. These were followed by a night encounter exercise with HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR). (1)
14 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted A/S exercises with the submarine HMS Upright (Lt. J.A.L. Wilkinson, RN).
Later HA gunnery exercises were carried out by HMS Cleopatra.
In the evening HMS Cleopatra conducted night encounter exercises with the frigate HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR) and corvette HMCS Kenogami (T/Lt. R.G. McKenzie, RCNVR). (1)
15 Nov 1944 HMS Cleopatra (Capt. B.I. Robertshaw, RN) conducted gunnery exercises of Bermuda.
In the evening night encounter exercises were carried out with the frigates HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR) and HMCS Poundmaker (T/Lt.Cdr. H.S. Maxwell, RCNVR). (1)

19 Dec 1944 HMS Vengeful (Lt. A.S. Melville-Ross, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Larne with HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR), HMS Narborough (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Muttram, DSC, RN), HMS Loch Eck (Lt.Cdr. R.C. Freaker, DSO and Bar, DSC, RD, RNR) and HMS Braithwaite (Lt.Cdr. P.J. Stoner, RN). (2)
28 Jan 1945 HMS Vengeful (Lt. A.S. Melville-Ross, DSC, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Loch Alsh with HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR) and HMS Inglis (T/A/Lt.Cdr. A.P. Cobbold, RNVR). (3)
28 Jan 1945 HMS Stubborn (Lt. A.G. Davies, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Loch Alsh with HMS Narborough (Lt.Cdr. W.R. Muttram, DSC, RN) and HMCS Lauzon (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Woods, OBE, RCNR). (4)
